penalties: Cross-AT divergence (HIGH confidence for native <select>, MEDIUM for ARIA combobox): VoiceOver announces this combobox as 'popup button' with state implicit in the role text, while NVDA/JAWS announce 'combo box, expanded/collapsed' explicitly. Verify with real testing if this control is on a critical path.

diagnostics.message: No skip-to-content link found. Keyboard and screen-reader users must Tab through all navigation elements to reach the main content. A skip link is the single most impactful fix for navigation cost. Concrete savings: a skip link would bypass 2 controls (22% of page interactive targets).
No <footer> / contentinfo landmark found. Adding <footer> helps screen-reader users locate site-wide links.
Structural overview: 4 headings · landmarks: main, banner, navigation · missing: contentinfo · skip link: no · 21 total targets

1 form field of standard input types lack a useful autocomplete attribute (or use autocomplete="off"): email "Parent email". Password managers and SR autofill rely on autocomplete tokens (e.g. autocomplete="current-password", autocomplete="email"); without them, users re-type values they shouldn't have to.

2 text elements lose contrast under simulated color-vision deficiency (tritanopia: 2). Examples (tritanopia): a "Parent form" — 9.4:1 normal → 2.44:1 tritanopia (needs 4.5:1); a "Embedded checkout" — 9.4:1 normal → 2.44:1 tritanopia (needs 4.5:1). Approximately 8% of male and 0.5% of female users have a CVD; choose color combinations whose contrast survives the deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia transforms or rely on luminance + non-color cues.
